message:
feat(ftui-runtime): integrate native TTY backend via feature gate (bd-lff4p.4.5)

- TtyBackend now implements BackendEventSource (delegates to inner
  TtyEventSource), so it can be used directly as Program's event source
  while also providing RAII terminal cleanup on drop.
- Added generic Program::with_event_source() constructor for alternative
  backends (native tty, WASM, headless testing).
- Added feature-gated Program::with_native_backend() constructor behind
  `native-backend` feature flag.
- ftui-demo-showcase wired to use native backend when feature is enabled
  via run_program() helper that selects the right constructor.

Enable with: cargo run -p ftui-demo-showcase --features native-backend

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -50,6 +50,8 @@ unicode-segmentation = "1.12.0"
 [features]
 debug-render = []
 caps-probe = ["ftui-core/caps-probe"]
+# Use the native ftui-tty backend instead of Crossterm.
+native-backend = ["ftui-runtime/native-backend"]
 default = ["caps-probe"]
 # Enable test-support to expose test infrastructure (locks, guards) to integration tests
 test-support = []

@@ -23,6 +23,9 @@ tracing = []
 # Enable widget state persistence with JSON file storage.
 # Adds FileStorage backend for cross-session state persistence.
 state-persistence = ["dep:serde", "dep:serde_json", "dep:base64"]
+# Native TTY backend (replaces Crossterm on Unix). When enabled, provides
+# `Program::with_native_backend()` constructor using `ftui-tty`.
+native-backend = ["dep:ftui-tty"]
 # Enable OpenTelemetry telemetry export via OTLP.
 # When enabled, spans can be exported to an OTLP collector.
 # Zero overhead when feature is off; minimal overhead when on but disabled via env.
@@ -44,6 +47,7 @@ ftui-render = { path = "../ftui-render", version = "0.1.1" }
 ftui-style = { path = "../ftui-style", version = "0.1.1" }
 ftui-text = { path = "../ftui-text", version = "0.1.1" }
 crossterm = "0.29.0"
+ftui-tty = { path = "../ftui-tty", version = "0.1.0", optional = true }
 tracing = "0.1.41"
 unicode-segmentation = "1.12.0"
 unicode-width = "0.2.2"
